title: Discord Dark Mode GUI
description: Applies the Dark Mode theme of discord to your Minecraft GUI. This resource pack changes not only the colour scheme of the inventory and other appliances such as chests, enchanting table, etc but also replaces existing icons with discord icons.
body:
The Recourse Pack Transforms the GUI of Minecraft to fit with discord's dark colour scheme.

The Pack is Based Of The Dark GUI Textures From Vanilla Tweaks, (https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) 

The Pack Also Changes Pre-Existing Icons To Some Icons You May Find Within Discord

that's all i have to say...
